SEARCH
Package dev.getelements.robloxkit

Interface RobloxMatchmakingService

public interface RobloxMatchmakingService
Service interface for Roblox matchmaking operations.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    HOST_PROFILE_ID
    Metadata key for the host profile ID.
    static final String
    RESERVED_SERVER_ID
    Metadata key for the reserved server ID.

    Method
    Description

    Deletes a match by its ID.

    Finds the host profile ID from the given multi-match.

    Finds a match based on the provided match request.

  • Field Details

    • HOST_PROFILE_ID

      static final String HOST_PROFILE_ID
      Metadata key for the host profile ID.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RESERVED_SERVER_ID

      static final String RESERVED_SERVER_ID
      Metadata key for the reserved server ID.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • findMatch

      MatchStatusResponse findMatch(FindMatchRequest matchRequest)
      Finds a match based on the provided match request.
      Parameters:
      matchRequest - the match request containing matchmaking criteria
      Returns:
      an optional containing the match request if a match is found, or empty if no match is found

    • getMatchStatus

      MatchStatusResponse getMatchStatus(String matchId)
      Gets the status of a match by its ID.
      Parameters:
      matchId - the ID of the match
      Returns:
      the match status response containing match details

    • updateMatch

      MatchStatusResponse updateMatch(String matchId, UpdateMatchRequest updateMatchRequest)
      Updates a match with the provided update request.
      Parameters:
      matchId - the ID of the match to update
      updateMatchRequest - the update request containing new match details
      Returns:
      the updated match status response

    • deleteMatch

      void deleteMatch(String matchId)
      Deletes a match by its ID.
      Parameters:
      matchId - the ID of the match to delete

    • leaveMatch

      MatchStatusResponse leaveMatch(String matchId, String profileId)
      Leaves a match for a given profile ID.
      Parameters:
      matchId - the ID of the match to leave
      profileId - the profile ID of the user leaving the match
      Returns:
      the match status response after leaving the match

    • isHost

      static boolean isHost(dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch multiMatch, dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.profile.Profile profile)
      Determines if the given profile is the host of the multi-match.
      Parameters:
      multiMatch - the multi-match object
      profile - the profile to check
      Returns:
      true if the profile is the host, false otherwise

    • findHostProfileId

      static Optional<String> findHostProfileId(dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch multiMatch)
      Finds the host profile ID from the given multi-match.
      Parameters:
      multiMatch - the multi-match object
      Returns:
      an optional containing the host profile ID if present, otherwise empty

    • findReservedServerId

      static Optional<String> findReservedServerId(dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch multiMatch)
      Finds the host profile ID from the given multi-match.
      Parameters:
      multiMatch - the multi-match object
      Returns:
      an optional containing the host profile ID if present, otherwise empty

    • findMetadataProperty

      static Optional<String> findMetadataProperty(dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch multiMatch, String propertyName)
      Finds a specific metadata property from the given multi-match.
      Parameters:
      multiMatch - the multi-match object
      propertyName - the name of the metadata property to find
      Returns:
      an optional containing the property value if present, otherwise empty

    • setHostProfileId

      static dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch setHostProfileId(dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch multiMatch, String profileId)
      Sets the host profile ID in the given multi-match's metadata.
      Parameters:
      multiMatch - the multi-match object
      profileId - the host profile ID to set
      Returns:
      the updated multi-match object (always the same object as the input)

    • setReservedServerId

      static dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch setReservedServerId(dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch multiMatch, String reservedServerId)
      Sets the reserved server ID in the given multi-match's metadata.
      Parameters:
      multiMatch - the multi-match object
      reservedServerId - the reserved server ID to set
      Returns:
      the updated multi-match object (always the same object as the input)

    • setMetadataProperty

      static dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch setMetadataProperty(dev.getelements.elements.sdk.model.match.MultiMatch multiMatch, String propertyName, String propertyValue)
      Sets a specific metadata property in the given multi-match.
      Parameters:
      multiMatch - the multi-match object
      propertyName - the name of the metadata property to set
      propertyValue - the value of the metadata property to set
      Returns:
      the updated multi-match object (always the same object as the input)
